title: Login page renders and accepts credentials
instructions: Verify the login form renders cleanly, important controls are visible, and the page has no obvious layout breakage.

title: Tracked companies list renders
instructions: Verify the tracked companies page loads after login, the primary table/list renders, and no major UI breakage or empty-state bugs appear unexpectedly.

title: Company detail page renders
instructions: Open one tracked company and verify the detail page loads with the timeline, signals, and chat trigger visible.

title: Competitor timeline toggle behaves correctly
instructions: Open one tracked company, locate the competitor timeline UI, and verify compare mode can be reached without visual or interaction bugs.

title: Delivery email save persists after navigation
instructions: Change the delivery email to a clearly different valid value, save it, navigate away and back, and verify whether the saved value persists.

title: Email frequency save persists after navigation
instructions: Change the email frequency, save if needed, navigate away and back, and verify whether the chosen frequency persists.

title: Invite member UI works
instructions: Navigate to organization settings and verify the invite-member form renders, can be interacted with, and does not show layout or validation bugs before submission.

title: Invite accept page handles invalid token cleanly
instructions: Load the invite accept page with the provided token in the URL and verify the page handles the invalid or missing invite state without broken UI.

title: Reports page renders and filters cleanly
instructions: Verify the reports page renders, key controls are visible, and report selection/filter controls do not show obvious UI regressions.

title: Company chat open state renders correctly
instructions: Open a tracked company, expand the chat interface, and verify the panel opens cleanly without clipping, overlap, or broken controls.

title: Company chat can send one message and receive one response
instructions: Open a tracked company, send exactly one simple question in chat, wait for the assistant response, and report whether the chat flow succeeds or breaks.

title: Mobile layout sanity on companies flow
instructions: Test the authenticated companies flow in a mobile viewport and report layout overflow, clipped content, unusable controls, or other mobile-specific UX bugs.

title: Broken images and icon regressions
instructions: Scan the authenticated app surfaces you touch in this scenario for broken images, missing icons, or obviously failed asset loads.

title: Pipeline 'Run Now' trigger works
instructions: Navigate to the companies page, click the 'Run' or 'Run Now' button to trigger a manual pipeline run. Verify the button responds, shows a loading/progress state, and does not error out or hang. Report whether a confirmation or result appears.

title: Signal cards render with correct data
instructions: Open a tracked company's detail page and scroll to the signal timeline. Verify that signal cards render with a title, source, date, and no broken layouts. Check that at least one signal is visible if the company has been processed.

title: Organization switcher changes company list
instructions: If an organization switcher is visible in the sidebar or header, switch to a different organization and verify the company list updates. If only one org exists, verify the switcher is either hidden or shows the current org without errors.

title: Empty state renders correctly when no companies tracked
instructions: If there are no tracked companies, verify the empty state message renders cleanly with a call-to-action to add a company. If companies exist, search for a nonsense query to trigger the 'no results' empty state and verify it shows an appropriate message.

title: Error feedback appears on failed actions
instructions: Navigate the app normally and check for any error toast or inline error messages after page loads. If no errors occur naturally, try an action that might fail (like untracking and immediately re-tracking a company) and verify the UI shows error feedback instead of a blank or frozen screen.

title: Competitor search returns correct results
instructions: Open a tracked company's detail page, find the competitor search input, and type a well-known company name like 'Stripe'. Verify results appear, there are no duplicate entries for the same company, and selecting one adds it to the competitor list.
